meta.title: Vortexes Ltd. - Accessing the inaccessible
meta.description: Industrial rope access and commercial diving services for complex marine, underwater and difficult-access environments.

hero.title: Accessing the inaccessible
hero.description: Vortexes is a premier industrial service provider specializing in high-risk access solutions. We bridge the gap between land and sea, offering elite expertise in Industrial Rope Access and Commercial Diving. Our mission is simple: to deliver precision engineering and maintenance services in environments where standard access is impossible.

above.title: Above
above.description: Industrial rope access for elevated structures and difficult-to-reach worksites.

below.title: Below
below.description: Commercial diving for underwater inspections, maintenance, and subsea operations.

beyond.title: Beyond
beyond.description: Integrated access solutions with precision, reliability, and strict safety control.

diving.title: Commercial Diving
items: Civil engineering and marine construction support

safety.title: Safety & Standards
safety.description: At Vortexes, safety is not just a policy, it is our foundation. We operate under the strictest international guidelines, ensuring that every project is risk-assessed and executed with zero-incident goals.

iso.title: Standards
iso.healthSafety: ISO 45001:2018 occupational health and safety certification

certifications.title: Certifications
items: Certified by Bureau Veritas Marine & Offshore

versatility.title: Versatility
versatility.description: One team for height, depth, and complex access works.

efficiency.title: Efficiency
efficiency.description: Fast turnaround with minimal downtime and precise planning.

expertise.title: Expertise
expertise.description: Dual-skilled professionals with field-tested operational discipline.

contact.title: Single Point of Contact
contact.description: Clear coordination and seamless project management.

projectContact.title: Let's Talk About Your Project
projectContact.description: Join clients who get difficult solutions where traditional approaches are impossible.

projects.title: Past Projects

meta.title: Past Projects - Vortexes Ltd.
meta.description: Selected completed commercial diving, industrial rope access and marine operation projects by Vortexes Ltd.

projects.description: A selection of successfully completed projects across commercial diving, industrial rope access and marine operations.

nekHydroFacilities.title: NEK EAD - Hydrotechnical Facilities and HPP/PSHPP
nekHydroFacilities.description: Diving inspections, surveys and repair works on intake screens, gate valves, pressure pipelines, bottom outlets and other hydrotechnical facilities at sites including HPP Vacha II, HPP Krichim, PSHPP Orpheus, HPP Pasarel, Lukovit Reservoir, Chaira Reservoir, Golyam Beglik Reservoir, HPP Tsankov Kamak and others.

dpusyaDamsOutlets.title: DPUSYA - Reservoirs and Bottom Outlets
dpusyaDamsOutlets.description: Diving services and construction works for improving and restoring the flow capacity of reservoir bottom outlets, including Omarski Geran - 441, Gorna Brestnitsa - 20, Blatata - 424 and Golyam Varbovnik.

srednogorovoReservoir.title: Srednogorovo Reservoir
srednogorovoReservoir.description: Cleaning of the intake shaft and bottom outlet, replacement of the outlet valve and installation of a supply pipeline inside the reservoir bowl for firefighting needs.

suhodol2Reservoir.title: Suhodol-2 Reservoir
suhodol2Reservoir.description: Underwater inspection and restoration of the stop valve operation.

vardun2Reservoir.title: Vardun-2 Reservoir
vardun2Reservoir.description: Restoration of the bottom outlet flow capacity.

tichaReservoir.title: Ticha Reservoir
tichaReservoir.description: Inspection and repair of gate facilities at the intake towers for irrigation, water supply and the bottom outlet.

topolnitsaReservoir.title: Topolnitsa Reservoir
topolnitsaReservoir.description: Cleaning in front of the bottom outlet screens from trees, sediment and other obstructions.

teremNavalArsenal.title: TEREM - Naval Arsenal Shipyard, Varna
teremNavalArsenal.description: Underwater welding, sealing a breach on Floating Dock 2, ship docking, inspections, rehabilitation of underwater facilities and underwater construction works.

shipDivingOperations.title: Ship Diving Operations
shipDivingOperations.description: Diving inspections, cleaning, installation, dismantling and repair works on the underwater parts of vessels from the fleets of GIDROSTROY LTD, Bulgarian Dredging Company and others.

lenaKoleva.title: m/v Lena Koleva
lenaKoleva.description: Installation and removal of sea chest blanks, diving inspection of the hull, propeller-rudder group and overboard fittings, plus cleaning of marine growth from sea chest shafts and grids.

silvia.title: m/v Silvia
silvia.description: Underwater cutting and welding, dismantling and installation of a grid, removal of rope wrapped around the bow thruster propeller and diving inspection of the underwater hull.

batya.title: m/v Batya
batya.description: Cleaning marine growth from sea chest shafts and related bottom-side overboard fitting grids.

varnaRailFerryComplex.title: Varna Rail Ferry Complex
varnaRailFerryComplex.description: Diving inspection, dismantling and installation of marine fender systems related to rehabilitation, reconstruction and modernization of quay walls and adjacent infrastructure.

pristaOilHolding.title: Prista Oil Holding EAD
pristaOilHolding.description: Execution of rock armoring over a sand cushion at a base oils terminal berth in Navigation Canal No. 1, Varna.

plaschimT.title: Plastchim-T AD
plaschimT.description: Dismantling, installation and repair of a flap valve in a water reservoir from the cooling system of a BOPP production line.

instituteOceanologyBas.title: Institute of Oceanology - BAS
instituteOceanologyBas.description: Light diving activities for a field experiment under the REST COAST project, related to restoration of marine macrophytes and coastal ecosystems.

meta.title: Contact - Vortexes Ltd.
meta.description: Contact Vortexes Ltd. for industrial rope access, commercial diving and complex access project inquiries.
